data.raceComments: {"comment":"2. SOIREE took the sit on the lead from a low draw but levelled up and led around the bend to score (41.57) at Q Parklands in a OPEN over 710m. SURREALIST was in the placings last time but prior to that clocked a strong 34.57 win over 600m at Q Parklands. Has the ability and looks a key chance. 3. AYDEN'S WARRIOR is generally an honest type in the frame at 23 of 63 starts but missed the placings last time when fifth (35.05) over 605m at Dubbo. Has a good record at this journey.
